recommendations.title: The Party
recommendations.overview: A thirteen-year-old French girl deals with moving to a new city and school in Paris, while at the same time her parents are getting a divorce.

recommendations.title: All That Heaven Allows
recommendations.overview: Two different social classes collide when Cary Scott, a wealthy upper-class widow, falls in love with her much younger and down-to-earth gardener, prompting disapproval and criticism from her children and country club friends.

recommendations.title: Where the Tracks End
recommendations.overview: Georgina is a teacher determined to make a difference in the lives of the children she educates in the classroom of a wagon school in rural Mexico.

recommendations.title: The Bad Education Movie
recommendations.overview: Mr Wickers and his class go on one final school trip after they finish their GCSEs.

recommendations.title: Jack

recommendations.title: Harriet the Spy
recommendations.overview: When the secret notebook of a young girl who fancies herself a spy is found by her friends, her speculations make her very unpopular! Can she win her friends back?
